summary: Strongest current baseline in the repo, using vibration + compact temperature descriptors.

stratified.notes: Best stratified checkpoint from auto-training round 22 (2048/512, 160x160). Macro-F1=0.7762. DO NOT use runs/logs_stft_strat/best.pt — that is a different, weaker run (4096/1024, 224x224, trained from scratch).

temporal.notes: Current best temporal multi-modal baseline. Initialized from auto_r22/best.pt.

fullrange.notes: Full lifecycle evaluation for overall-file comparison; can also be evaluated with vote aggregation.
